page_metadata.biotools__summary: BioNetComp is a Python package for biological network development and comparison. BioNetComp compares two biologial networks from a list of genes/proteins. It provides both an easy-to-use object-oriented Python API and a command-line interface (CLI) for network comparison and post-analysis.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: BioNetComp is a Python package for biological network development and comparison. BioNetComp compares two biologial networks from a list of genes/proteins. It provides both an easy-to-use object-oriented Python API and a command-line interface (CLI) for network comparison and post-analysis.
